testcase.name: Draft Deletion Validation › should properly delete drafts when publishing from draft modal

failure.message: draft-deletion-validation.spec.ts:30:3 should properly delete drafts when publishing from draft modal

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e/draft-deletion-validation.spec.ts:30:3 › Draft Deletion Validation › should properly delete drafts when publishing from draft modal
Error: expect(received).toBeGreaterThan(expected)
Expected: > 0 Received: 0
51 | 52 | // Verify we have drafts to test with > 53 | expect(initialDrafts).toBeGreaterThan(0); | ^ 54 | 55 | // Get the localStorage draft count before test 56 | const initialStorageCount = await page.evaluate(() => { at /workspaces/agent-feed/frontend/tests/e2e/draft-deletion-validation.spec.ts:53:27

testcase.name: Draft Deletion Validation › should handle multiple draft publications correctly

testcase.name: Draft Deletion Validation › should preserve draft data if publish fails

testcase.name: Draft Deletion Validation › should handle edge cases with different content types
